About Me

Who I Am

A CSE undergrad with a Java-first mindset and a passion for building impactful software.

Background

I'm Suraj Kumar Chauhan, a 2nd-year Computer Science & Engineering student with a strong passion for Java development and software engineering. My journey started with core Java fundamentals and quickly expanded into full-stack web development, algorithms, and problem-solving.

I have completed an 8-week Java Full Stack internship at EduSkills Academy, where I mastered Core Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, and MySQL. I also have foundational knowledge in Python, which I use for scripting and AI/ML tasks.

I'm driven by a clear goal: to become a skilled Software Developer who writes clean, maintainable code and delivers real value in every project.

Java is my primary language

Work

Featured Projects

Projects built with Java, Python, and full-stack web technologies.

☕
Java Full Stack Web Application
A complete Java Full Stack application built during the EduSkills internship, demonstrating Spring Boot REST APIs, Hibernate ORM, MySQL backend, and a Bootstrap-powered frontend.
  • Spring Boot REST API with CRUD operations
  • Hibernate JPA for database ORM with MySQL
  • jQuery + Bootstrap responsive frontend
  • Git version control & deployment
Java Spring Boot Hibernate MySQL Bootstrap
GitHub
🔍
🏆 Hackathon
Spasht Bot – Ayushman Bharat Fraud Detection
An AI-powered fraud detection dashboard for the Ayushman Bharat health scheme, using Isolation Forest anomaly detection to surface suspicious claims in real-time.
  • Real-time fraud scoring with Isolation Forest
  • Flask REST API backend with Python analytics
  • Interactive dashboard with visualizations
  • Claim pattern analysis & risk categorization
Flask Python Isolation Forest MongoDB Bootstrap
GitHub Live Demo
🔡
Self-Supervised OCR System
An OCR pipeline using contrastive learning and Python to extract text from complex document images with minimal labeled data.
  • Contrastive learning pretraining
  • OpenCV image preprocessing pipeline
  • Works on noisy, low-quality scans
  • Python scripting with PyTorch fundamentals
Python OpenCV PyTorch Scikit-learn
GitHub
